brand: Biblia le Agbalẽ Mlɔ Ɖeka me
docTitle: Biblia le Anyigbatata Dzi · Biblia le Agbalẽ Mlɔ Ɖeka me
metaDesc: Dze Nubabla Xoxo ƒe ɣeyiɣiɖoɖo, Yesu ƒe agbe, kple Paulo ƒe mɔzɔzɔwo yome le anyigbatata vavã dzi — Biblia dzɔ le teƒe vavãwo.

s.kicker: Biblia le Agbalẽ Mlɔ Ɖeka me · Anyigbatatawo
s.title: Biblia le Anyigbatata Dzi
s.verse: “Nya si míegblɔ na mi le ale si mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo le vava ge ŋusẽtɔe ŋu la, menye ŋutinya kpakpa si wokpa aɖaŋutɔe la mee míeɖee le gblɔ na mi o. Míawo ŋutɔe kpɔ eƒe bubu, atsyɔ̃ kple ŋusẽ la tututu kple ŋku hafi gblɔe na mi.” (Petro II 1:16)
s.purpose: Biblia menye nukpɔsusu masɔmasɔ o. Enye nuŋlɔɖi tso amewo siwo zɔ le teƒe, ŋkeke, kple ŋkɔ vavãwo dzi ŋu. Dze mɔ mawo yome le anyigbatata dzi, le ɣeyiɣi ƒe ɖoɖo nu — tɔ asi teƒe aɖe dzi, alo zi ▶ dzi ne nàzɔ to eme afɔɖeɖe ɖe sia ɖe.
s.ot_kick: ① Nubabla Xoxo — le ɣeyiɣiwo me
s.ot_h: Tso nuwɔwɔ va se ɖe tɔtrɔ yi Yerusalem
s.ot_lead: Menye mɔzɔzɔ ɖeka o, ke boŋ ɖeɖeŋutinya ƒe sisi tso nuwɔwɔ dzi: nuwɔwɔ kple anyidzedze → tsiɖɔɖɔ kple Babel → yɔyɔ (Abraham) → ŋugbedodonyigba la → Gododo → gbedzi → anyigbaxɔxɔ → fiaɖuƒe → mama → aboyomenɔnɔ → tɔtrɔgbɔ.
s.je_kick: ② Nubabla Yeye — Yesu ƒe agbe
s.je_h: Tso Betlehem va se ɖe Yerusalem
s.je_lead: Dze Yesu ƒe agbe yome abe ale si Nyanyuiwo gblɔe ene, le ɖoɖo nu — tso eƒe dzidzi le Betlehem, to eƒe mawutsideta kple Galilea subɔsubɔdɔ me, to Samaria, va se ɖe ati la, tsitretsitsi kple ɖoɖomedzi le Yerusalem.
s.pa_kick: ③ Nubabla Yeye — Paulo ƒe mɔzɔzɔwo
s.pa_h: Tso Antioxia va se ɖe anyigba ƒe seƒewo — Roma
s.pa_lead: Tso Pentekoste le Yerusalem, ale si nyanyui la keke ta wu Yudea — to Asia Sue kple Europa va ɖo fiaɖuƒe gã la ƒe dzime. Tia mɔzɔzɔ atɔ̃awo dometɔ ɖeka (gbãtɔ·evelia·etɔ̃lia + ʋuɖoɖo yi Roma + le ablɔɖexɔxɔ megbe) eye nàdze Amedɔdɔawo ƒe Dɔwɔwɔwo ƒe nudzɔdzɔwo yome kple agbalẽ siwo woŋlɔ le mɔa dzi.
s.foot: Dzɔtsoƒewo · Teƒeawo dze Biblia ƒe nyawo kple Biblia ƒe anyigbaŋunya si bɔ (kple egbegbe ŋkɔwo afi si wòkpena ɖe ame ŋu). Woɖe ƒutawo, tɔsisiwo kple ƒuwo tso anyigbaŋunya ƒe nyatakaka ʋuʋu (Natural Earth) me, hebɔbɔe.
s.contact: Biabiawo · nuƒoƒo — Ðo email ɖe mí

eden.name: Eden (Nuwɔwɔ · Anyidzedze)
eden.note: Ðe xexe si wowɔ be wònyo ŋutɔ me la, nuvɔ̃ ge ɖe eme eye wòŋe ka si le Mawu kple amegbetɔ dome.
events: Nuwɔwɔ le ŋkeke ade me — “enyo ŋutɔ”
Amegbetɔ wɔwɔ ɖe Mawu ƒe nɔnɔme nu
Anyidzedze la, kple nyanya tso Eden
Nyanyui ƒe ŋugbedodo gbãtɔ — “nyɔnu la ƒe dzidzimevi agbã da la ƒe ta”

noah.name: Ararat (Tsiɖɔɖɔ la)
noah.today: Ararat To, Turkiye ƒe ɣedzeƒe lɔƒo, egbea
noah.note: Mawu drɔ̃ ʋɔnu xexe si yɔ fũu kple nuvɔ̃, gake wòdzra agbe ɖo to ƒome ɖeka dzi.
events: Xexe si gbegblẽ yɔ fũu
Tsiɖɔɖɔ la, kple Noa ƒe aɖaka la
Anyieʋɔ ƒe nubabla — “tsiɖɔɖɔ magava agblẽ anyigba akpɔ o”

babel.name: Babel ƒe Mɔ
babel.note: Ðe dada si didi be yeaɖo dziƒo ŋu la, Mawu kaka woƒe gbe kple dukɔwo ɖe anyigba katã dzi.
events: “Mina míatu du kple mɔ… ne míaɖe ŋkɔ na mía ɖokui”
Mawu tɔtɔ woƒe gbegbɔgblɔ
Dukɔwo kaka ɖe anyigba katã dzi (Sinar — si va zu Babilon emegbe)

ur.name: Ur
ur.note: Biblia ƒe ɖeɖeŋutinya dze egɔme kple ŋutsu ɖeka yɔyɔ.
events: Mawu yɔ Abram do goe le Kaldeatɔwo ƒe Ur
“Mana dukɔ gã aɖe nado tso mewò… ƒomeawo katã ato dziwò axɔ yayra”
To xɔse me la, edzo le eƒe denyigba

haran.name: Haran
haran.note: Le mɔa dzi, wòtɔ na yɔyɔ la henɔ mɔ zɔm ɖo ta ŋugbedodonyigba la.
events: Tera ƒe ƒomea va nɔ Haran
Tera ku
Abram dze mɔ ɖo ta Kanaan esi wòxɔ ƒe 75

shechem.name: Sikem · Kanaan
shechem.note: Le ŋugbedodonyigba la dzi la, woɖo ƒome aɖe anyi eye nubabla la va dzidzimewo dome.
events: Kanaan gegeɖeme, vɔsamlekpui gbãtɔ — “wò dzidzimeviwo matsɔ anyigba sia na”
Nubabla la (Mose I 15) · Isak · Yakob
Yakob ƒe viŋutsu wuieveawo — to wuieveawo ƒe ke

egypt.name: Egipte (Gosen)
egypt.note: Ƒome ɖeka va zu dukɔ gã — emegbe wòzu kluviwo ƒe dukɔ.
events: Wodzra Yosef ɖa, gake wòva kpɔ Egipte dzi
Yakob ƒe ƒome bliboa ɖi va be woasi le dɔwuame nu
Wotsɔ Israel-dukɔ si le dzidzim ɖe edzi la wɔ kluviwoe

sinai.name: Sinai To
sinai.note: Nubabla Xoxo ƒe ɖeɖe titina la — kluviwo va zu Mawu ŋutɔ ƒe dukɔ.
events: Dɔvɔ̃ ewoawo kple Ŋutitotoŋkekenyui ƒe alẽvi la
Ƒu Dzẽ la ma me eye wotso
Se Ewoawo, Sea, agbadɔ la kple vɔsawo

kadesh.name: Kades (Gbedzi)
kadesh.note: Dzimaxɔse na dzidzime ɖeka bu anyigba la — gake Mawu ganɔ wo gbɔ kokoko.
events: Ŋkutsala wuieveawo — gake dukɔ la gbe xɔse
Ƒe 38 le gbedzi — mana, lilikpo kple dzo
Le Moab gbadzaƒe, Mose ƒe mawunyagbɔgblɔ mamlɛtɔ (Mose V)

jericho.name: Yeriko
jericho.note: Mlɔeba la, woge ɖe ŋugbedodonyigba la me eye woxɔe.
events: Yɔdan-tɔsisi la ma me eye dukɔ la tso
Yeriko ƒe gliawo mu dze anyi
Kanaan xɔxɔ kple anyigba la mama

shiloh.name: Silo (Ɖelawo)
shiloh.note: Esi fia aɖeke menɔ anyi o ta la, ame sia ame wɔ nu si dze eŋu — fia vavã aɖe hiã.
events: Woɖo agbadɔ la anyi ɖe Silo
Nuvɔ̃–teteɖeanyi–ɖeɖe ƒe tsatsalia (Debora, Gideon, Samson)
Rut — nuteƒewɔwɔ le ŋkeke viviti me, le David ƒe dzidzime me

jerusalem.name: Yerusalem · Fiaɖuƒe Ðekawɔwɔ la
jerusalem.note: Israel ƒe kɔkɔƒe ɣeyiɣi — kple fia mavɔ aɖe ƒe ŋugbedodo.
events: Fia gbãtɔ Saul, emegbe David kple Goliat
David ƒe nubabla — “wò fiazikpui anɔ anyi tegbee” (Samuel II 7)
Salomo tu gbedoxɔ la ɖe Yerusalem

samaria.name: Samaria · Fiaɖuƒe Mama la
samaria.note: Fiaɖuƒea ma eye wòdze anyi esime nyagblɔɖilawo nɔ ɣli dom.
events: Le Salomo megbe, dukɔ la ma ɖe Yuda kple Israel
Trɔ̃subɔsubɔ edziedzi
Eliya, Yesaya, Yeremya do ɣli be ‘mitrɔ gbɔ’ — eye wogblɔ Mesia la ŋu nya ɖi

nineveh.name: Ninive (Asiria)
nineveh.note: Esi wometsɔ ɖeke le nuxlɔ̃ame ɖe sia ɖe me o ta la, anyiehe lɔƒoa dze gbã.
events: Ninive, Asiria ƒe fiadu
Anyiehe fiaɖuƒea dze le Asiria ƒe asi me (722 D.Y.)
Woɖo Yona ɖe Ninive

babylon.name: Babilon
babylon.note: Zã si do blukɔ wu — gake gbugbɔɖoɖoanyi ƒe ŋugbedodo gakpɔtɔ li.
events: Yerusalem dze, wotɔ dzo gbedoxɔ la (586 D.Y.)
Wokplɔ Yuda yi Babilon
Daniel kple Hesekiel — xɔse kple ŋutegawo le aboyome

susa.name: Susa (Persia)
susa.note: Le trɔ̃subɔla ƒe fiaɖuƒe gã ƒe titina gɔ̃ hã la, Mawu kpɔ eƒe dukɔ ta.
events: Persia ɖu Babilon dzi
Ester ɖe Yudatɔwo tso tsɔtsrɔ̃ me
Nexemya do gbe ɖa le fia la ŋkume eye woɖoe ɖa

return.name: Tɔtrɔ yi Yerusalem
return.note: Wotrɔ gbɔ eye wogbugbɔ tu nu — gake fia aɖeke meva o. Wole Mesia lalam.
events: Tɔtrɔgbɔ ʋuʋu etɔ̃ to Sirus ƒe sededea me (Zerubabel 538 · Ezra 458 · Nexemya 444)
Wogbugbɔ tu gbedoxɔ la eye wogaɖo Yerusalem gliawo te
Maleaxi — Nubabla Xoxo wu nu: “Kpɔ ɖa, mele nye dɔla dɔm ɖa”

bethlehem.name: Betlehem
bethlehem.note: Mesia si ŋugbe wodo la va David ƒe du me — Nya la va zu amegbetɔ.
events: Wodzii le Betlehem, David ƒe du la me
Mawudɔlawo ɖe gbeƒã nya la na alẽkplɔlawo
Ɣletivimenunyalawo va be yeasubɔe

nazareth.name: Nazaret
nazareth.note: Mawu tsi abe amegbetɔ ene le du tsɛ aɖe me.
events: Wonyii le atikpala ƒe aƒe me
Le ƒe wuievelia me, ebia nya heɖo eŋu le gbedoxɔ la me
Emegbe, wogbe nu le esi le eƒe dedu ƒe ƒuƒoƒe

jordan.name: Yɔdan Tɔsisi la
jordan.note: Eƒe dutoƒo subɔsubɔdɔ dze egɔme — dziƒo ɖo kpe edzi be eyae nye Vi la.
events: Yohanes de mawutsi ta nɛ
Gbɔgbɔ la ɖi abe akpakpa ene — “Ame siae nye Vinye lɔlɔ̃a”
Eɖu Satan ƒe tetekpɔ etɔ̃awo dzi le gbedzi

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: Le eƒe dzesi gbãtɔ me la, eɖe eƒe ŋutikɔkɔe fia.
events: Amekpekpe aɖe le srɔ̃ɖeƒe
Tsi trɔ zu wein — eƒe dzesi gbãtɔ
Eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo xɔ edzi se

sychar.name: Sikar (Samaria)
sychar.note: Subɔsubɔdɔ ƒe gɔmedzedze ƒe mɔ — to Yerusalem me heyi Samaria si wodo vlo la.
events: Ekɔ gbedoxɔ la ŋu le Yerusalem
Le zã me, Nikodemo — “Ele be woagadzi wò”
Agbetsi na Samaria nyɔnu aɖe

capernaum.name: Kapernaum
capernaum.note: Galilea subɔsubɔdɔ ƒe nɔƒe gãtɔ — yɔyɔ, nufiafia kple tsitretsiɖeŋu ƒo ƒu ɖe afi sia.
events: Eyɔ ƒumeɖelawo eye wòtu nɔƒe ɖe afi sia
Toa dzi ƒe nufiafia — “Dzidzɔtɔwoe nye hiãtɔwo le gbɔgbɔ me”
Fiaɖuƒe la ŋuti lododowo — kple tsitretsiɖeŋu si le dzidzim ɖe edzi

galilee.name: Galilea Ƒu la
galilee.note: To ŋusẽ si le esi ɖe dzɔdzɔme dzi me la, eɖe ame si wònye la fia.
events: “Zi ɖoɖoe, nɔ kpoo” — eɖe gbe na ahom la
Etsɔ abolo atɔ̃ kple akpa eve na ame akpe atɔ̃ ɖu nu
Ezɔ ƒu la dzi

caesarea_p.name: Kaisarea Filipi
caesarea_p.note: Nusrɔ̃lawo se egɔme be eyae nye Kristo, eye ati la ƒe mɔ ʋu.
events: Petro ƒe xɔseʋuɖeɖe — “Wòe nye Kristo, Mawu gbagbe la ƒe Vi”
Egblɔ eƒe ku kple tsitretsitsi ŋu nya zi gbãtɔ
Wotrɔ eƒe nɔnɔme le ŋutikɔkɔe me le toa dzi

jericho.name: Yeriko
jericho.note: Le mɔ si yi Yerusalem dzi la, edi ame siwo bu.
events: Ena ŋku ʋu na ŋkuagbãtɔ Bartimeo
Eyɔ dugadzɔla Zakeo
“Amegbetɔ ƒe Vi la va be yeadi ame siwo bu, ahaɖe wo”

bethany.name: Betania
bethany.note: Eɖe eƒe ŋusẽ ɖe ku dzi fia hafi eƒe kwasiɖa mamlɛtɔ nadze egɔme.
events: Efɔ Lazaro ɖe tsitre tso yɔdo me — “Nyee nye tsitretsitsi kple agbe la”
Maria si ami nɛ ɖe eƒe ɖiɖi ŋu
Dzesi sia na woɖo tame kokoko be yewoawui

jerusalem.name: Yerusalem
jerusalem.note: Kɔkɔƒe si Biblia bliboa le asi fiam — ati la, tsitretsitsi, kple ɖoɖomedzi.
events: Ŋutikɔkɔe ƒe gegeɖeme; egatrɔ gbedoxɔ la me kplɔ̃wo bu
Le Fiẽnuɖuɖu Mamlɛtɔ la me, eklɔ nusrɔ̃lawo ƒe afɔwo
Eku ɖe ati la ŋu
Egbɔ agbe le ŋkeke etɔ̃lia gbe, emegbe wòlia yi dziƒo

antioch.name: Antioxia
antioch.note: Hame si dɔa amewo ɖa, afi si dɔ na ame siwo menye Yudatɔwo o dze egɔme le hetrɔ gbɔna.
events: Le gbedodoɖa me la, Gbɔgbɔ la ɖe Barnaba kple Saul ɖe aga
Hame si me woyɔ xɔsetɔwo be ‘Kristotɔwo’ zi gbãtɔ le
Mɔzɔzɔ gbãtɔ, evelia kple etɔ̃lia ƒe gɔmedzeƒe

seleucia.name: Seleukia
seleucia.note: Antioxia ƒe melidzeƒe — woɖo ʋu ɖo ta Kipro.

salamis.name: Salamis (Kipro)
salamis.note: Tɔteƒe gbãtɔ le Kipro — mawunyagbɔgblɔ le ƒuƒoƒewo.

paphos.name: Pafos
paphos.note: Woɖe ŋusẽ fia ɖe ame siwo tsi tsitre ɖe nyanyui la ŋu ŋu.
events: Elima afakala la ƒe ŋku gbã
Mɔmefia Sergio Paulo xɔ edzi se
Tso afi sia dzi la, ‘Paulo’ va zu kplɔla

perga.name: Perga
perga.note: Melidzeƒe aɖe le Pamfilia — afi sia Yohanes Marko trɔ dzo le.

pantioch.name: Pisidia ƒe Antioxia
pantioch.note: Nyanyui la ʋu ɖe ame siwo menye Yudatɔwo o gbɔ.
events: Ðeɖeŋutinya ƒe mawunyagbɔgblɔ legbe aɖe le ƒuƒoƒe la
Ame siwo menye Yudatɔwo o gbogbo aɖe kpɔ dzidzɔ hexɔ nya la
Wonya wo do goe le tsitretsiɖeŋu ta

iconium.name: Ikonio
iconium.note: Ame geɖe xɔ edzi se, gake yometiti na wòyi ŋgɔ.

lystra.name: Listra
lystra.note: Wobui be enye mawu, emegbe woƒu kpee.
events: Eda ŋutsu aɖe si nye tekunɔ tso dzɔdzɔ me gbɔ
Ameha la dze agbagba be yeasa vɔ na wo abe mawuwo ene
Woƒu kpee hegblẽe ɖi be eku, gake wòtsi tsitre

derbe.name: Derbe
derbe.note: Wowɔ nusrɔ̃la geɖe; wotrɔ ɖe wo megbe be yewoado ŋusẽ hameawo.

troas.name: Troa
troas.note: Afɔɖoƒe si trɔ nu, afi si nyanyui la ɖo ta Europa zi gbãtɔ le.
events: Makedonia ŋutsu aɖe ƒe ŋutega
“Tso va kpe ɖe mía ŋu”
Wotso yi Europa enumake

philippi.name: Filipi
philippi.note: Europa ƒe hame gbãtɔ — nyanyui la ɖu dzi le gaxɔ me gɔ̃ hã.
events: Lidia, avɔ dzĩ dzrala, xɔ edzi se
Woɖe kluvinyɔnuvi bokɔdela aɖe
Zãtitina hadzidzi, anyigbaʋuʋu, gaxɔdzikpɔla ƒe aƒekɔ xɔ ɖe

thess.name: Tesalonika
thess.note: Nya la ʋuʋu dua eye tsitretsiɖeŋu dzo.
events: Eƒo nu kple wo le ƒuƒoƒe la me Sabat etɔ̃
“Ame siwo trɔ xexea me bu”
Wodo go dzaa le zã me

berea.name: Berea
berea.note: Ame ‘dɔmenyotɔwo’ siwo dzro nya la me na wo ɖokui.
events: Woxɔ nya la kple dzidzɔ blibo
Gbe sia gbe wodzroa mawunyawo me be yewoakpɔe ɖa
Ame geɖe va xɔ edzi se

athens.name: Atene
athens.note: Le nunyalawo ƒe du la me la, eɖe gbeƒã ‘mawu manyamanya’ la.
events: Trɔ̃wo yɔ du la me fũu, eye esia ʋã eƒe gbɔgbɔ
Le Areopago la dzi, wògblɔ Nuwɔla kple tsitretsitsi ŋuti nya
Woɖu fewu, gake ame ʋɛ aɖewo xɔ edzi se

corinth.name: Korinto
corinth.note: Enɔ afi ma ƒe ɖeka kple afã, hetu hame ɖe du si me nu vlowɔwɔ bɔ ɖo.
events: Etu agbadɔwo kple Akwila kple Priskila
“Mègavɔ̃ o… elabe meli kpli wò”
Korintotɔ geɖe xɔ edzi se eye wode mawutsi ta na wo

ephesus.name: Efeso
ephesus.note: Mɔzɔzɔ etɔ̃lia ƒe dzime — nya la keke ta le Asia.
events: Nufiafia gbe sia gbe ƒe eve le Tirano ƒe nufiaƒe
Wotɔ dzo dzowɔgbalẽwo; ŋusẽdɔ gãwo
Klosalonutula Demetrio he ʋunyaʋunya

miletus.name: Mileto
miletus.note: Gbedodo si me aɖatsi le na Efeso hamemetsitsiwo.
events: “Mikpɔ hame si wòtsɔ eya ŋutɔ ƒe ʋu ƒlee la dzi”
Hamemetsitsiwo fa avi, elabe wonya be yewomagakpɔe akpɔ o

caesarea.name: Kaisarea
caesarea.note: Ƒe eve wòʋli nyanyui la ta le mɔmefiawo kple fia aɖe ŋkume.
events: Ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃wo le mɔmefia Felike kple Festo ŋkume
Eƒe taʋiʋli le Fia Agripa ŋkume
“Metsɔ nye nya de Kaisaro si” — heyi Roma

jerusalem.name: Yerusalem
jerusalem.note: Wolée le gbedoxɔ la me, eye eƒe mɔzɔzɔ abe gamenɔla ene dze egɔme.
events: Ameha la lée le gbedoxɔ la me
Eʋli eɖokui ta le takpekpe gã la ŋkume
Abe Roma-dukɔmevi ene la, woɖoe kple asrafowo ɖe Kaisarea

myra.name: Mira
myra.note: Woge ɖe Aleksandria-ʋu si ɖo ta Roma me.

fairhaven.name: Melidzeƒe Nyuiwo (Kreta)
fairhaven.note: Womeɖo to Paulo ƒe nuxlɔ̃ame be woadzudzɔ ʋuɖoɖo o.

crete.name: Kreta
crete.note: Le eƒe ablɔɖexɔxɔ megbe, ƒukpo si dzi wògblẽ Tito ɖi be wòaɖɔ hameawo ɖo.
events: Egblẽ Tito ɖi be wòaɖo hamemetsitsiwo ɖe du sia du me
Ebia kplɔla siwo ŋu mokaka mele o, nuteƒewɔlawo
Eŋlɔ agbalẽ ɖo ɖe Tito

malta.name: Melita
malta.note: To ahom kple ʋugbagbã me la, Mawu ƒe ŋugbedodo li ke.
events: Ahom sesẽ la gbã ʋu la, gake ame 276 katã tsi agbe
Da aɖe ɖui, gake naneke mewɔe o
Eda ƒukpoa dzi dɔnɔwo gbɔ

puteoli.name: Puteoli
puteoli.note: Woɖi go ɖe Italia eye nɔvi xɔsetɔwo va kpe wo.

rome.name: Roma
rome.book: Amedɔdɔawo ƒe Dɔwɔwɔwo 28 · Gaxɔmegbalẽawo · Timoteo II
rome.note: Mlɔeba la, nyanyui la ɖo fiaɖuƒe gã la ƒe dzime — menye nuwuwu o, ke boŋ gɔmedzedze.
events: Ƒe eve le aƒemenɔɖoɖo te, wòɖe gbeƒã fiaɖuƒe la dzideƒotɔe
Tso afi sia wòŋlɔ Gaxɔmegbalẽawo (Efeso·Filipi·Kolose·Filemon)
Emegbe wogalée de gaxɔ me, wòŋlɔ Timoteo II eye wòku ɖe xɔse ta — “Meʋli ʋiʋli nyui la, mewu duƒuƒu la nu”
